zh.lifeSummary: John de Cobham於大約1230年出生在英國肯特可巴姆。他於大約1259年與Joan Septvans在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他在英國肯特羅徹斯特被列為constable of rochester。他去世於1300年3月30日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國肯特可巴姆。

zh-hans.Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, Uni: 英国英格兰素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素
zh-hans.Eynsford, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰肯特艾斯福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: John de Cobham于大约1230年出生在英国肯特可巴姆。他于大约1259年与Joan Septvans在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他在英国肯特羅徹斯特被列为constable of rochester。他去世于1300年3月30日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国肯特可巴姆。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: John de Cobham was born about 1230, in Cobham, Kent, England. He married Joan Septvans about 1259, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. His occupation is listed as constable of rochester in Rochester, Kent, England. He died before 30 March 1300, in his hometown, and was buried in Cobham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John de Cobham est né environ 1230, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre. Il a épousé Joan Septvans environ 1259, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est constable of rochester à Rochester, Kent, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 30 mars 1300, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, Uni: Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: John de Cobham wurde um 1230 in Cobham, Kent, England geboren. Er hat um 1259 in Kent, England Joan Septvans geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als constable of rochester in Rochester, Kent, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 30. März 1300 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cobham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John de Cobham è nato il circa 1230 nel Cobham, Kent, England. Lui sposato Joan Septvans circa 1259, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come constable of rochester nel Rochester, Kent, England. Morì prima del 30 marzo 1300, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Cobham, Kent, England.

ja.Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, Uni: イギリスイギリススリーステルボロウ カストル

ja.Cobham, Kent, England: イギリスケントコブハム
ja.lifeSummary: John de Cobhamは約1230年にイギリスケントコブハムで生まれた。約1259年にイギリスケントでJoan Septvansと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。イギリスケントロチェスターでの職業はconstable of rochesterと記録されている。彼は1300年3月30日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスケントコブハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Cobham(은)는 대략 1230년 영국 켄트 컵함에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1259년 영국 켄트에서 Joan Septvans(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 켄트 록헤스터에서 constable of rochester이었다. 그는 1300년 3월 30일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 켄트 컵함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John de Cobham nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Joan Septvans aproximadamente 1259, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como constable of rochester em Rochester, Kent, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 30 de março de 1300, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ro.Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, Uni: Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: John de Cobham родился около 1230 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Septvans около 1259 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.  Он работал по профессии constable of rochester в местности рошестир, кэнт, Англия. Он умер перед 30 марта 1300 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John de Cobham nació aproximadamente 1230, en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra. Se casó con Joan Septvans aproximadamente 1259, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era constable of rochester en Rochester, Kent, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 30 de marzo de 1300, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.
